name: mansion-dining
summary: The formal dining hall of a great house — one long table dominates the processional axis, flanked by sideboards and candelabra.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: long rectangle along the table axis

primary_palette.note: the classic banquet — eight-to-twelve seats, head at each end
intimate dining — half the table set, candelabra down the runner
round-table house — equal seating, designed for conversation

story_prompts: the feast is laid, guests not yet seated — servants frozen in tableau
mid-banquet crisis — a place just vacated, a chair overturned, wine spilled on the runner
the morning after — half-eaten courses, guttered candles, a single servant surveying the wreckage
the hall is laid for a wedding that will not happen
a council dinner — political factions arranged by seating, knives deliberately sharp

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: formal bright (0.5-0.6) — chandelier over the table plus wall sconces

anti_patterns: the long table runs the long axis — do not place it crosswise in a long room
chairs come in pairs across the table, not singles — formal symmetry
avoid working props — no workbenches, no tools. This room performs.
food is scatter, not primary — the props are the setting, not the meal
